original: Is your lovely swollen midsection holding you back on your adventures? Turn it into an advantage! The TamaniCorp Pregsuit is made of piezoelectric fibers that provide extra energy to shield emitters as it stretches, overcharging at a particular level of thickness. As a bonus, the conduction grid it creates insulates effectively against electrical attacks.
